name: 反擊型
description: 面對嘲諷和欺壓，女主不再如原主般忍氣吞聲，而是以現代人的自信和邏輯進行犀利反擊。這類對白讓觀眾感受到「替代性報復」的快感。

examples.drama_title: Transmigrated Into the Body of Unloved Princess,Using Modern Knowledge,She Ascends Throne.#cdrama
examples.excerpt: （字幕資料不足，基於標題推斷：女主面對欺凌時可能回擊「你以為我還是從前的那個人嗎？」「不受寵？那就讓你們看看，不受寵的人能走多遠」）

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: You want to sentence me and my child to death other than creating two souls that will haunt this world causing you sleepless nights. What benefit is there for you in this?
